sigWerErrors.reason: Adding 'sí' (yes) at the beginning does not change the main meaning of the sentence, just adds an affirmation.
Changing from singular 'sería' (would be) to plural 'serían' (would be, plural) slightly changes the grammatical number but does not significantly alter the meaning in this context.
Omitting 'en' (in) slightly changes the structure but the main meaning (the amount 'cuatro mil') is still clear.
